nasb.text: and these are the names of the sons of Ishmael, by their names, in the order of their birth: Nebaioth, the firstborn of Ishmael, and Kedar and Adbeel and Mibsam

esv.text: These are the names of the sons of Ishmael, named in the order of their birth: Nebaioth, the firstborn of Ishmael; and Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,

cnv.text: 以實瑪利的眾子，按著他們的家譜，名字如下：以實瑪利的長子是尼拜約，其次是基達、押德別、米比衫、

ccb.text: 以下是以实玛利的儿子，按出生的次序是：尼拜约、基达、亚德别、米比衫、

csbs.text: 以实玛利的儿子们，按着他们的谱系，名字如下：以实玛利的长子是尼拜约，然后是基达、亚德别、米比衫、
